use_cases: Indicate loading states during data fetching operations
Show processing feedback when submitting forms
Display loading status in buttons during async actions
Provide visual feedback during page transitions
Indicate background processing in dashboard widgets
ai_summary: A lightweight spinning loader component built on Lucide's Loader2Icon with Tailwind CSS animate-spin utility. This versatile component serves as a universal loading indicator that can be placed anywhere in the UI to communicate async states, with a clean minimalist aesthetic using the standard Lucide icon style.
